metadata.title: Iskra - Advertising Agency and Influencer Marketing
metadata.description: Iskra is an advertising agency specialized in influencer marketing, brand positioning and creative digital strategies.
metadata.ogTitle: Iskra - Advertising Agency and Influencer Marketing
metadata.ogDescription: Iskra is an advertising agency specialized in influencer marketing, brand positioning and creative digital strategies.
metadata.twitterTitle: Iskra - Advertising Agency and Influencer Marketing
metadata.twitterDescription: Iskra is an advertising agency specialized in influencer marketing, brand positioning and creative digital strategies.

hero.description: Iskra is an advertising and digital marketing agency specialized in influencer marketing, brand building and strategic campaigns with creators, actors and digital talents in Colombia.

strengthSection.title: Our true strength
strengthSection.subtitle: Marketing strategies with carefully selected influencers.

card1.title: We don't sell influencers
card1.description: ISKRA designs strategies with carefully selected influencers.

card2.title: Strategic criteria
card2.description: Our differential: deep analysis, ethics and long-term vision.

card3.title: Comprehensive strategies
card3.description: We connect brands with influencers ethically and sustainably.

pricing.title: Fair pricing
pricing.description: We work with transparent rates that take care of both the brand and the creator. We want sustainable relationships where everyone wins: brands receive real value and influencers are fairly recognized for their work. No surprises or hidden costs, everything clear from the start.

highlightSection.title: Convert digital presence into real positioning
highlightSection.description: ISKRA is the strategic advertising agency and influence that converts digital presence into real positioning, through campaigns with creators based on criteria, professional negotiation and impeccable execution.

capacidadesSection.title: Our Capabilities
capacidadesSection.subtitle: What we do for your brand

cards.title: Brand Strategy
cards.description: We develop comprehensive positioning and communication strategies that connect your brand with your target audience.

cards.title: Influencer Marketing
cards.description: We create campaigns with carefully selected influencers to generate real and measurable impact on your audience.

cards.title: Content Production
cards.description: We generate high-quality audiovisual and digital content adapted to the needs of each platform.

cards.title: Relationship Management
cards.description: We negotiate and manage relationships with creators and talent to ensure successful collaborations.

howWeWorkSection.title: Our team
howWeWorkSection.description: Iskra is made up of a multidisciplinary team of professionals in strategy, creativity and campaign management. Each project is developed with specialists who are activated according to the objectives and needs of each brand.
points: Multidisciplinary team activated according to each project
howWeWorkSection.additional: This work model has been designed to ensure operational flexibility, efficiency in management and a high level of specialization in each phase of the projects.
howWeWorkSection.supervision: The strategic direction and direct supervision of the projects are personally assumed, with the objective of guaranteeing coherence, solidity and a constant orientation towards measurable results.

stepsSection.title: How we work at Iskra?
stepsSection.subtitle: We boost your brand step by step

steps.title: Diagnosis and objective definition
steps.text: In-depth analysis of needs, audiences and strategic opportunities.

steps.title: Strategic design and creative concept
steps.text: Development of the unique narrative and value proposition for the campaign.

steps.title: Influencer selection and curation
steps.text: Rigorous validation of profiles aligned with objectives and audiences.

steps.title: Professional negotiation and contracting
steps.text: Expert advice on terms, scopes and contractual conditions.

steps.title: Content production and publication
steps.text: Creative direction and guidelines for authentic and strategic content.

steps.title: Impact measurement and optimization
steps.text: Analysis of results, actionable insights and continuous improvement.

steps.title: Quality control and monitoring
steps.text: Continuous monitoring of performance and compliance with standards.

national.title: Influencer Marketing Strategy
national.description: We design strategies aimed at influencers, content creators and artists, aligned with the commercial objectives of each brand, focused on impact, reach and real conversion.

national.title: Creative Strategy
national.description: We are a company specializing in the development of creative strategies for brands, focused on designing and executing solutions that generate connection, positioning, and measurable results. We work with companies of all sizes, guiding them in defining and evolving their communication based on a deep understanding of their identity, objectives, and audience. Our approach integrates storytelling, content strategy, and creative execution, aligning every action with the brand's DNA and the dynamics of the digital ecosystem. We believe in strategically applied creativity as a driver of value, impact, and sustainable business growth.

national.title: Influencer Selection and Curation
national.description: We analyze data, real engagement, and brand affinity to select authentic profiles that connect with the right audience and generate measurable results.

national.title: Support for New Influencers
national.description: We guide new creators in their positioning, content, personal branding, and first collaborations so they can enter the market professionally.

national.title: Consulting for Junior Creators
national.description: We advise on pricing, brand negotiations, organic growth, content optimization, and building a sustainable career within the digital ecosystem.

international.title: Influencer management for brands entering LATAM
international.description: We support international brands in their entry into the Latin American market through influencer marketing strategies tailored to each country. We handle the strategic selection of creators, brand positioning, content development, digital activations, and full campaign execution. Our approach combines local cultural knowledge with strategic planning to ensure a genuine connection with audiences.

international.title: Transatlantic campaigns(Europe–Latin America)
international.description: We connect international brands with content creators in Colombia and Latin America to develop campaigns with regional reach. We design the content strategy, manage negotiations, and coordinate full execution, ensuring consistency across markets. We work with carefully selected profiles that allow us to reach specific niches and growing audiences, avoiding saturation of traditional audiences.

international.title: Hybrid activations (Europe–Latin America)
international.description: We design activations that combine in-person and digital experiences across Europe and Latin America. From brand launches to strategic events amplified by content creators in both markets, we structure campaigns that integrate experience, visibility, and influence. We handle planning, international coordination, and execution, ensuring strategic alignment and measurable results.

collaborationsPage.title: Real cases
collaborationsPage.description: Talent and brands with which we have developed campaigns, strategies and growth processes within the digital ecosystem.

hero.tagline: Built for intelligent growth in the next era.
hero.description: We help the world's leading brands solve their most critical growth challenges by giving them access to industry-leading insights, breakthrough technology, and the most creative talent in the business.

connectedCapabilities.title: A competitive edge across every dimension
connectedCapabilities.description: Our connected capabilities give brands a measurable advantage in the modern world of marketing and sales.

omni.title: Omnicom's AI-driven marketing intelligence platform
omni.description: Omni unites creativity, media, data, and AI to help brands grow with greater clarity, speed, and measurable impact in the age of influence.

cards.title: Intelligence-Infused Data
cards.body: A single source of truth. Infinite clarity.

cards.title: Outcome-Based Media Buying
cards.body: ROI you can prove, not just promise.

investors.title: A record of sustained growth
investors.description: Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) sets the standard for marketing and sales leadership by consistently building stronger brands and delivering superior outcomes.
